kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{body} = { id=124508990002 | username=Swell | firstName=Swell | lastName=Silva | email=susumakan@gmail.com | password=susumakan22# | phone=489992324 | userStatus=2324 }
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/user path_url=/v2/user headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '184', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"id": 124508990002, "username": "Swell", "firstName": "Swell", "lastName": "Silva", "email": "susumakan@gmail.com", "password": "susumakan22#", "phone": 489992324, "userStatus": 2324}'

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Create Dictionary

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

errors.msg: [ DataDriver ] Error in robot file: File "C:\iterasys01\PetStoreRobot140\__tests__\test_user_dinamico.robot", line 0
